description: Pixel Flow 像素传送带 - PixiJS v8 核心规则断言

assertions.description: boot 后 state.phase 为 ready
存在中央棋盘（state.board.blocks 是数组）
传送带上的小猪数组存在
@check(conveyor-logic) 传送带逻辑正确 - 点击开始后小猪在传送带上移动
@check(attack-logic) 攻击逻辑正确 - 小猪只能攻击同色目标块

setup.js: const blocks = window.gameState.board.blocks; const redBlock = blocks.find(b => b.color === 'red' && !b.destroyed); window.__redBlockBefore = redBlock ? redBlock.hp : 0; window.gameTest.drivers.deployPigByIndex(0);

assertions.description: @check(block-logic) 异色阻挡逻辑 - 小猪不能穿透异色块

setup.js: window.gameTest.drivers.clickStartButton(); window.gameState.phase = 'playing'; const blocks = window.gameState.board.blocks; const col = 2; blocks.forEach(b => { if (b.col === col) b.destroyed = true; }); blocks.push({ id: 999, row: 0, col: col, color: 'blue', hp: 1, maxHp: 1, destroyed: false }); blocks.push({ id: 998, row: 1, col: col, color: 'red', hp: 1, maxHp: 1, destroyed: false }); window.gameState.conveyor.pigs = []; window.gameState.conveyor.pigs.push({ id: 100, color: 'red', ammo: 3, position: { side: 'top', index: col }, conveyorSlot: 0, state: 'on-conveyor', lastAttackTime: 0 }); window.__blueBlockBefore = blocks.find(b => b.id === 999).destroyed;

assertions.description: @check(recycle-logic) 回收逻辑正确 - 未耗尽弹药的小猪返回等待槽
@check(level-progression) 关卡递进正确 - 第1关
强约束：不得全屏自动索敌

setup.js: window.gameTest.drivers.clickStartButton(); window.gameState.phase = 'playing'; const blocks = window.gameState.board.blocks; const col = 2; blocks.forEach(b => { if (b.col === col) b.destroyed = true; }); blocks.push({ id: 888, row: 0, col: col, color: 'blue', hp: 1, maxHp: 1, destroyed: false }); blocks.push({ id: 887, row: 1, col: col, color: 'red', hp: 1, maxHp: 1, destroyed: false }); window.gameState.conveyor.pigs = [{ id: 200, color: 'red', ammo: 3, position: { side: 'top', index: col }, conveyorSlot: 0, state: 'on-conveyor', lastAttackTime: 0 }];

assertions.description: 强约束：禁止一次攻击多个同色块

setup.js: window.gameTest.drivers.clickStartButton(); window.gameState.phase = 'playing'; const blocks = window.gameState.board.blocks; const col = 3; blocks.forEach(b => { if (b.col === col) b.destroyed = true; }); blocks.push({ id: 777, row: 0, col: col, color: 'red', hp: 1, maxHp: 1, destroyed: false }); blocks.push({ id: 776, row: 1, col: col, color: 'red', hp: 1, maxHp: 1, destroyed: false }); window.gameState.conveyor.pigs = [{ id: 300, color: 'red', ammo: 3, position: { side: 'top', index: col }, conveyorSlot: 0, state: 'on-conveyor', lastAttackTime: 0 }]; window.__ammo_before = 3;
